title: Future of Marketing Briefing: Why Bose is building an entertainment company
description: Bose has a new entertainment division. Its CMO hasn’t used a creative agency in five years. The two things are related.

title: Back-to-school season has become a summer-long event, thanks to an earlier Prime Day
description: Amazon’s earlier Prime Day this year pushed back-to-school deals into June. With that, competing retailers including Walmart and Target joined in chasing budget-focused shoppers long before school starts.

title: Target grows marketplace with Forever 21, Clarks brand additions
description: The mass retailer is using the invite-only Target Plus marketplace to capitalize on trending categories such as K-beauty.

title: Sherwin-Williams adopts Square features for its pro customers
description:
Sherwin-Williams is repainting its business-to-business (B2B) payment ecosystem, selecting Square to embed payments, invoicing and cash flow tools. Square options will appear directly within the experience for Sherwin-Williams’ Digital Alliance Program for Pro+ customers. That customer category includes professional painters, contractors and designers. The new move grows Sherwin-Williams’s role as a more intertwined partner for […]
The post Sherwin-Williams adopts Square features for its pro customers appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Saddle Creek Logistics names new CEO
description:
Saddle Creek Logistics Services started July by naming a new CEO, Grady Martin. The company is a third-party logistics (3PL) provider. It offers warehousing, fulfillment and transportation solutions. Saddle Creek Logistics said in an announcement that its CEO change is part of a “planned leadership transition.” Martin’s new appointment became effective July 1. Most recently, […]
The post Saddle Creek Logistics names new CEO appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Who are the Top 10 U.S. retailers in 2026?
description:
Across two different sets of criteria, seven U.S. retailers fall in the Top 10 in 2026. Both the National Retail Federation (NRF) and Digital Commerce 360 have released their rankings of the largest retailers in the region. The key discrepancy deciding Nos. 1 and 2 is how each set of rankings categorizes sales. Whereas the […]
The post Who are the Top 10 U.S. retailers in 2026? appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Sociable: Reddit launches ‘People are the Best’ campaign
description: The platform’s new promotional message highlights the real conversations happening in-app each day and takes subtle aim at artificial intelligence.

title: Mike’s Hot Honey spurs experimentation with soccer-infused campaign
description: The multichannel marketing push is an extension of the “Drizzle The Mike’s” platform, which seeks to place the brand at culturally relevant moments.

title: How Tom Holland’s nonalcoholic Bero breaks through with brand partners
description: Co-founded by the Spider-Man star, the beer brand has used partnerships with Chase and fitness chain Barry’s to charge its marketing efforts.

title: Nuvei names new C-suite executives
description: The Canadian company that just bought New York-based Payoneer remade its C-suite, and is doubling down on agentic commerce.

title: AIEWF Daily Dispatch: The great loops debate and the state of AI engineering
description: The AI Engineer World’s Fair ended with a debate about loops, a report on the state of AI engineering, and closing keynotes focused on what to build next.

title: Vercel's Andrew Qu on why agents are a new kind of software
description: The Vercel Chief of Software explains how its agent framework, eve, was created — and why skills, sandboxes and agent-readable websites now matter.

title: 5 Content Marketing Ideas for August 2026
description:
Ecommerce marketers in August 2026 can address back-to-school shopping, relaxation, aviation, photography, and Labor Day planning.
The post 5 Content Marketing Ideas for August 2026 appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.

title: StockX expands with debut of used, vintage listings
description: StockX Listings uses AI photo analysis and pricing guidance so sellers can list products quickly.

title: Target, Parachute team up again on home capsule collection
description: The two partnered last year and are back for round two as Target revamps its merchandise offerings.
